name: *~Tokoyami // Winter time~*
description:
❄️~\\ A bird in the winter //~❄️

Winter was midway through its course, however not a flake of snow had yet fallen, until today.

_______________________________________________

This is meant to be a pretty open ended scenario. You can be whoever or whatever you want – at least, that's the goal.

Obviously, this takes place in winter.

I made him aged up in this (18)! This is purely for a better story, but can be for whatever you want. I only aged him up to 18 because I still wanted to give people the opportunity for the story to take place in UA if that's what you'd prefer. Also cause rules and worry of what people would try...

_______________________________________________

PLEASE do not tell me if you do anything really disturbing. Should seem obvious but there are people on this site that would do otherwise, and have.

I wasn't able to put info on pretty much anyone else, because I didn't want it to be too many tokens and not work properly, but I did give a brief description on Hawks. (I don't know how many tokens is too many :b)

{[I didn't know what I was supposed to put for the scenario...]}

✨Note:

This is my first bot I've every made on here, so I hope it's decent. I'm open to criticism. Also, Proxy is on, because a lot of people seem to enjoy it, I don't really know what it is though.

Also! What kind of coffee do you think he would like? I would say black coffee, but I also think he'd like something very sweet.
creator: Zeerostia
